name: SALLY FACE
description:
a sally face rpg bot.

— characters include:

Sal Fisher "Sally Face", Larry Johnson, Travis Phelps, Ashley Campbell, Lisa Johnson, Todd Morrison, Chug Cohen, Maple Cohen, Soda Cohen, Henry Fisher, Neil Douglas.

i originally created this bot for myself since I have yet to find an RPG bot of sally face including most of the characters, but i decided to make it public for others to enjoy as well!

this is a "create your own scenario" bot, mostly because i was too lazy to write an initial message, but also because i do not want to make multiple bots of one character for different scenarios. Enjoy pookies xoxo
creator: oranguts
